block_info.label: Kronecker
block_info.description: Kronecker block targeted for AI Engines.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: The form of IO: 0 for windows, 1 for streams
parameters.label: API:

parameters.name: data_type_A
parameters.description: describes the data type of input A to the function.
parameters.label: A input data type:

parameters.name: data_type_B
parameters.description: describes the data type of input B to the function.
parameters.label: B input data type:

parameters.name: dim_a_rows
parameters.description: describes number of rows of input Matrix A.
parameters.label: Rows in input A:

parameters.name: dim_a_cols
parameters.description: describes number of columns of input Matrix A.
parameters.label: Columns in input A:

parameters.name: dim_b_rows
parameters.description: describes number of rows of input Matrix B.
parameters.label: Rows in input B:

parameters.name: dim_b_cols
parameters.description: describes number of columns of input Matrix B.
parameters.label: Columns in input B:

parameters.name: num_frames
parameters.description: describes number of input data frames to be processed per call to the function. Each frame corresponds to a Kronecker matrix product.
parameters.label: Number of frames:

parameters.name: shift_output
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of product terms before each output. TP_SHIFT must be in the range 0 to 59 (61 for AIE1).
parameters.label: Scale output down by 2^:

parameters.name: ssr
parameters.description: describes the number of kernels to use in parallel.
parameters.label: SSR:

parameters.name: rnd_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Rounding mode:

parameters.name: sat_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Saturation mode:
